purpose: Ready-to-import GitHub issue package for Skill Tree Navigation / Pathways stabilization.

source_review.docs_directory_status: Repository has multiple docs and handoff files under docs/, but no dedicated Skill Tree Navigation / Pathways status/spec document was found in docs search.
key_current_findings: SkillTreeNavScreen already uses Pathways branding, live XP, live progress, mini previews, Auto-Path modal, and /skill-branch deep links.
SkillBranchDetailScreen currently has duplicated overlay approaches and mutates path/center fields during build.
SkillBranchPathPlanner is centralized and mostly ready with weighted topological sorting.
branch_path_providers.dart exists, but branchCentersProvider returns raw positions while claiming screen-space centers.
MiniHexBranchPreview supports highlighted paths but fromGraph does not truly use the passed graph.

milestones.title: Skill Tree Navigation Stabilization
milestones.description: Normalize Pathways navigation, branch detail Auto-Path UX, overlay rendering, persistence, docs, and tests.

import_notes.schema: Generic issue package. Map each item to GitHub issue fields: title, body, labels, milestone, assignees.
import_notes.body_template_hint: When importing, concatenate body, files, acceptance_criteria, dependencies, priority, and estimate into GitHub issue body markdown.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Normalize route contract for global tree vs branch detail
issues.body: Current navigation uses `/skill-tree/$groupId` for normal card taps and `/skill-branch/$branchId?step=0&showPath=1` for Auto-Path/search deep links. Standardize branch detail to `/skill-branch/:branchId` and reserve `/skill-tree` for the full/global skill tree.
acceptance_criteria: All branch card taps route to `/skill-branch/:branchId`.
Auto-Path modal routes to `/skill-branch/:branchId?step=<n>&showPath=<0|1>`.
Search results route to branch detail with `?step=0&showPath=1`.
`/skill-tree` remains reserved for full/global tree.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Consolidate branch path overlays to one painter
issues.body: Branch Detail currently imports/renders both `BranchPathOverlayPainter` and `AutoPathOverlayPainter`. Keep `AutoPathOverlayPainter` as the canonical overlay and remove the older overlay layer unless intentionally retained as legacy.
acceptance_criteria: Only one overlay painter is rendered.
Full-path and current-step highlighting still work.
No duplicate line/halo effects are visible.
Unused legacy painter is removed or clearly marked legacy.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Remove build-time mutation from SkillBranchDetailScreen
issues.body: Branch Detail recalculates/mutates `_computedPath`, `_pathIds`, `_centers`, and ValueNotifier values during build. Convert these to local derived values or sync in a guarded post-frame method when graph/branch changes.
acceptance_criteria: `build()` has no direct assignments to path/center fields.
Path and centers are provider/local derived values.
Step clamping does not mutate ValueNotifier during build.
No lifecycle errors appear entering Branch Detail.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Clarify branch center coordinate contract
issues.body: `branchCentersProvider` says screen-space center but returns `state.positions`, which are world/layout positions. Choose one contract: rename to world centers or transform into screen-space in Branch Detail where `_transform.value` is available.
acceptance_criteria: Provider name/comment accurately describes world vs screen coordinates.
Overlay lines align with visible nodes after zoom/pan.
No duplicate center maps are maintained in Branch Detail.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Add production Branch Detail action bar
issues.body: Add a bottom action bar for current Auto-Path step: previous/next controls, Unlock if locked/available, Use if unlocked, XP cost, insufficient XP state, and cooldown state.
acceptance_criteria: Action bar appears when path exists.
Unlock disables for missing prereqs/XP.
Use disables when locked/on cooldown.
Successful action advances focus appropriately.
XP/cooldown state updates visibly.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Persist Auto-Path progress per branch
issues.body: Persist current Auto-Path step per branch in profile/local storage. URL query params should override saved progress when present.
acceptance_criteria: Branch restores last step when no query step is present.
Changing current step persists progress.
Deep link query param overrides saved progress.
Unknown/deleted node IDs are handled safely.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Clean MiniHexBranchPreview data flow
issues.body: `MiniHexBranchPreview.fromGraph` accepts a graph but build still reads `skillTreeProvider`. Either remove/rename the factory or add a graphOverride and use the provided graph.
acceptance_criteria: Factory uses provided graph or is removed.
No misleading unused constructor parameters remain.
`highlightPath` and `pathIds` still work.
Preview renders in nav cards and modal.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Data-drive branch cards instead of static metadata
issues.body: Branch card metadata is still hardcoded in `_getGroupsForType` while progress is live. Load titles, grouping, branch counts, and colors from `skillTreeGroupsProvider`/JSON with code fallback only.
acceptance_criteria: Nav groups are provider-backed.
Static `_GroupSpec` definitions removed or fallback-only.
Branch count reflects configured data.
Progress/available counts remain live.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Optimize AutoPathOverlayPainter rendering
issues.body: `AutoPathOverlayPainter` uses `saveLayer` inside each segment loop for dim mask clearing. Render the dim mask once and clear a single combined path, or disable dim-mask mode for mini previews/low-end devices.
acceptance_criteria: Painter avoids per-segment saveLayer calls.
Mini preview uses no dim mask.
Branch detail remains visually equivalent.
No frame drops with 20+ nodes.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Add dedicated Pathways/Skill Tree Navigation docs
issues.body: Docs directory has broad plans/checklists/handoffs but no dedicated current-state Skill Tree Navigation document from this review. Add `docs/skill_tree_navigation_status.md` with route map, architecture, known issues, next sequence, and QA checklist.
acceptance_criteria: New docs file exists under docs/.
Includes route map and key file map.
References generated JSON issue package.
Includes QA checklist for nav, auto-path, overlays, cooldown/use flows.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Add planner, overlay, and route tests
issues.body: Add tests for weighted topological planner, route deep-link parsing, mini preview route highlighting, and branch detail overlay data.
acceptance_criteria: Planner tests pass for DAG/cycle cases.
Route tests verify `/skill-branch/:branchId?step=0&showPath=1`.
Widget tests cover empty/valid branch states.
Tests are referenced from docs.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Add cooldown chips and next-available messaging
issues.body: Cooldown support exists in services/controller. Add consistent visual feedback in Branch Detail action bar, selected node detail, SkillNodeWidget overlay, and Auto-Path step list.
acceptance_criteria: Cooldown state appears in Branch Detail current-step action bar.
Use action disables while on cooldown.
Remaining time updates periodically.
Cooldown UI does not cause excessive rebuilds.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Persist unlocked nodes, cooldowns, and XP restore path
issues.body: Persist unlocked skill IDs, skill availability, cooldown end timestamps, player XP, and last Auto-Path step per branch so progression survives restart and can later sync to backend.
acceptance_criteria: Unlocked nodes persist after restart.
Cooldowns restore from end timestamps.
XP restores from profile/progression source.
Controller initializes graph state from persisted data.
Missing/deleted IDs are handled safely.

issues.title: [Skill Tree Navigation] Clean imports and duplicate provider paths
issues.body: Normalize skill-tree imports to avoid duplicate-type problems. Current files mix relative paths and package paths across graph models, providers, planners, and hex painters.
acceptance_criteria: Consistent imports across skill-tree files.
No duplicate type conflicts remain.
`dart analyze` reports no unused/ambiguous skill-tree imports.
Hex grid barrel export is used where appropriate.
